githubMetadata.description: Beautifully designed components that you can copy and paste into your applications.

repoSummary: Shadcn UI is a collection of re-usable React components styled with Tailwind CSS, designed to be copy-pasted directly into applications rather than imported as a bloated dependency package.

messages.content: Welcome to **shadcn-ui/ui** 🗺️ workspace! This is a pre-analyzed demo repository. You can explore its files, look at the dependency graph, or select any files in the explorer.
How are helpers like class merges organized here?

Tailwind styles are merged and combined dynamically using the custom utility helper function `cn` defined in `src/lib/utils.ts`. This utility sits at the base of almost all component nodes (like `button.tsx`, `dialog.tsx`, and `avatar.tsx`), enabling custom layouts without Tailwind specificity conflicts.
